Class DirectoryProofBundleHandler

java.lang.Object
org.key_project.proofmanagement.io.ProofBundleHandler
org.key_project.proofmanagement.io.DirectoryProofBundleHandler
All Implemented Interfaces:
Closeable, AutoCloseable
public class DirectoryProofBundleHandler extends ProofBundleHandler
ProofBundleHandler for a directory that respects the bundle file hierarchy.

    Creates a path to the entry with the given name inside the bundle.

    Returns a list of all paths to Java source files in the bundle.

    Returns the path to the top-level `project.key` file in the bundle, if existing, otherwise null.

  • Method Details

    • getBundleName

      public String getBundleName()
      Description copied from class: ProofBundleHandler
      Returns the name of the proof bundle.
      Specified by:
      getBundleName in class ProofBundleHandler
      Returns:
      the name as a String

    • getBundlePath

      public Path getBundlePath()
      Description copied from class: ProofBundleHandler
      Returns the root path of the proof bundle.
      Specified by:
      getBundlePath in class ProofBundleHandler
      Returns:
      the path of the bundle

    • relativize

      public Path relativize(Path path)
      Description copied from class: ProofBundleHandler
      Relativies the input path with respect to the bundle root.
      Specified by:
      relativize in class ProofBundleHandler
      Parameters:
      path - the path to relativize, assumed to point to a file in the bundle
      Returns:
      the input path relative to the bundle root

    • getProofFiles

      public List<Path> getProofFiles() throws ProofManagementException
      Description copied from class: ProofBundleHandler
      Returns a list of all paths to *.proof files in the bundle. Only *.proof files residing top-level in the bundle are considered.
      Specified by:
      getProofFiles in class ProofBundleHandler
      Returns:
      a list of paths to the *.proof files
      Throws:
      ProofManagementException - if the bundle can not be opened/accessed

    • getKeYFiles

      public List<Path> getKeYFiles() throws IOException
      Description copied from class: ProofBundleHandler
      Returns a list of all paths to *.key files in the bundle. Only *.key files residing top-level in the bundle are considered.
      Specified by:
      getKeYFiles in class ProofBundleHandler
      Returns:
      a list of paths to the *.key files
      Throws:
      IOException - if the bundle can not be opened/accessed

    • getSourceFiles

      public List<Path> getSourceFiles() throws IOException
      Description copied from class: ProofBundleHandler
      Returns a list of all paths to Java source files in the bundle. Only *.java files residing inside the src subfolder are considered.
      Specified by:
      getSourceFiles in class ProofBundleHandler
      Returns:
      a list of paths to the source files
      Throws:
      IOException - if the bundle can not be opened/accessed

    • getClasspathFiles

      public List<Path> getClasspathFiles() throws IOException
      Description copied from class: ProofBundleHandler
      Returns a list of all classpath files in the bundle. This includes only files inside the classpath subfolder. Considered file extensions are "java", "class", "zip" and "jar".
      Specified by:
      getClasspathFiles in class ProofBundleHandler
      Returns:
      a list of paths to the classpath files
      Throws:
      IOException - if the bundle can not be opened/accessed

    • getBootclasspath

      public Path getBootclasspath() throws IOException
      Description copied from class: ProofBundleHandler
      Returns the bootclasspath of the bundle. This is the bootclasspath subfolder, if it exists. Otherwise null is returned.
      Specified by:
      getBootclasspath in class ProofBundleHandler
      Returns:
      the bootclasspath or null, if none is specified
      Throws:
      IOException - if the bundle can not be opened/accessed

    • getTopLevelProjectFile

      public Path getTopLevelProjectFile()
      Description copied from class: ProofBundleHandler
      Returns the path to the top-level `project.key` file in the bundle, if existing, otherwise null.
      Specified by:
      getTopLevelProjectFile in class ProofBundleHandler
      Returns:
      the path to the top-level project file or null

    • getFileTree

      public PathNode getFileTree() throws IOException
      Description copied from class: ProofBundleHandler
      Returns a tree of the complete file hierarchy inside the bundle.
      Specified by:
      getFileTree in class ProofBundleHandler
      Returns:
      the file tree of the bundle
      Throws:
      IOException - if the bundle can not be opened/accessed

    • getPath

      public Path getPath(String entryName)
      Description copied from class: ProofBundleHandler
      Creates a path to the entry with the given name inside the bundle.
      Specified by:

      Parameters:

      Returns:
